commands: vite pm config set vite-plus-pm-config-test-key test-value --location project # should set config value in project scope
vite pm config get vite-plus-pm-config-test-key --location project # should get config value from project scope
vite pm config delete vite-plus-pm-config-test-key --location project # should delete config key from project scope (uses yarn config unset)
